check_name: Duplicate employee IDs in raw employee file
recommended_action: Deduplicate employee records before creating employee master.

check_name: Missing department in raw employee file
recommended_action: Replace missing departments with Unknown or resolve using source system.

check_name: Missing job level in raw employee file
recommended_action: Replace missing job levels with Unknown or validate with HR source.

recommended_action: Add missing departments to department lookup or correct source department values.
